zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth De Ferrers於1418年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比時，她的父親Henry de Ferrers24歲，母親Isabelle de Mowbray22歲。她於1432年之前與Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1483年1月23日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾拉特比享年65歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth De Ferrers于1418年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比时，她的父亲Henry de Ferrers24岁，母亲Isabelle de Mowbray22岁。她于1432年之前与Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1483年1月23日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾拉特比享年65岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth De Ferrers was born in 1418, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, her father, Henry de Ferrers, was 24 and her mother, Isabelle de Mowbray, was 22. She married Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby before 1432, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 23 January 1483, in Ratby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Groby, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth De Ferrers est née en 1418, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Ferrers, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Mowbray, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby avant 1432, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 janvier 1483, à Ratby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth De Ferrers 1418 in Groby, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Ferrers 24 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Mowbray 22. Sie hat vor 1432 in England Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Januar 1483 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Ratby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Groby, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth De Ferrers è nata il nel 1418 nel Groby, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Henry de Ferrers, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Mowbray, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby prima del 1432, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Ferrersが1418年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで生まれた時，父Henry de Ferrersは24歳，母Isabelle de Mowbrayは22歳であった。1432年以前にイギリスでEdward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Grobyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1483年1月23日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアラトビーで65歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Ferrers(이)가 1418년 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Ferrers(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Mowbray(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1432년 이전 영국에서 Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1483년 1월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 라트비에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth De Ferrers nasceu em 1418, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Ferrers, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Mowbray, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby antes 1432, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1483, em Ratby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth De Ferrers родилась в 1418 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry de Ferrers было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Mowbray, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby перед 1432 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 23 января 1483 г. в местности ратби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth De Ferrers nació en 1418, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Ferrers, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Mowbray, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby antes de 1432, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 23 de enero de 1483, en Ratby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
